fields.Name: Cvent

OutOfScopeObjectFamilies: SOAP Legacy API - pre-REST SOAP web services, no OpenAPI, replaced by Platform REST
Passkey/RegLink SSO - hotel room block management, separate API at developers.cvent.com/docs/passkey/
CSN Cvent Supplier Network - Hospitality Cloud venue sourcing, different auth + API surface
Webhooks/Hooks - integration infrastructure (subscription config), not event-data records to sync
CID/Attendee Identification Service - authentication flow, not event-data records

fields.Description: Cvent event management platform connector. Syncs events, contacts, attendees, sessions, speakers, exhibitors, housing, surveys, RFPs, webcasts, and related objects via the Cvent Platform REST API (OAuth 2.0 client credentials).
